mapper.sql: id, name, platform_type, api_key, base_url, model_name, max_tokens, temperature, extra_config::text as extra_config, is_default, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_platforms WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_platforms ( name, platform_type, api_key, base_url, model_name, max_tokens, temperature, extra_config, is_default, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{platformType}, #{apiKey}, #{baseUrl}, #{modelName}, #{maxTokens}, #{temperature}, #{extraConfig}::jsonb, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_platforms SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
